dialogos.texto_en: Hey hey, Miku-chan!
Can we ask you something?
What is it?
Miku-chan, you're dating Uesugi-kun, right?
Y-yeah, that's right.
(It's not like I'm hiding it,\n everyone in the class already\n knows about Futaro and I...)
So, how far have you gone with him?
...Wha-?\nWHAAAAAAAAA-?!
Oh, I see. You haven't gone that far yet.
W-w-w-w, why...would you ask that...
I mean, you and Uesugi-kun\nare a pretty mysterious pair, you know?
I never would have imagined\nthat you two would start dating.
So, I was just wondering if you guys are still doing well together?
Actually, everyone in class is curious to know as well, you know?
Everyone in the class, too?!
Well, graduation is coming up soon, right?\nThere are quite a few girls\nwho are thinking of confessing before then.
So, I guess people are starting to wonder\nif you guys are really currently dating or not.
And? How are things?\nDo you think you guys will be able to stay together\nafter graduation?
You ask me all these things...\nBut, it really hasn't changed since\nbefore we started dating...
Maybe we just go out together a little more now.\nThat's about it.
Did you guys spend the night together?
W-what?\nNo way! We went home the same day!
Ahhh...
See, I told you. Uesugi-kun doesn't seem to be interested\nin pursuing girls,\nhe seems to be only interested in studying.
I was hoping he would at least turn into an alpha wolf\nin front of his girlfriend.
A-a wolf?!
Yes! Men are ALL feral!
And on top of that, you are SO cute, Miku-chan.\nI wonder how Uesugi-kun manages to hold himself back.
Have you guys kissed yet?
K-kiss?\nW-w-well...
Well?
(I did kiss Futaro before at the school festival,\n but we weren't dating yet, and I just impulsively kissed him.\n I wonder if that kiss mean't anything!)
Huhhh?!\nYou still haven't kissed him?
U-um, uhh...
Uesugi-kun's so MEEK!
You've been dating ever since the school festival, right?\nIt's already been six months,\nso I thought you two would have at least kissed.
...Is that normal?
Kissing is a normal thing for couples.
I see, so you haven't kissed yet,\neven though it's been six months...
Not six. Only five months.
Yea only a one month difference, though.\nIf it's been that long, isn't it normal\nto take things to the next level?
The next level?!
Ahaha!\nMiku-chan, you are just so cute!
D-don't tease me...
Sorry! I just can't resist.
I just can't believe\nUesugi-kun could get himself a girlfriend like you.
That's not true.\nI think Futaro is..
Ah!
I see, you like him that much, huh.
...Yeah.
Awww!\nYou're such a cutey?!\nUesugi-kun is such a lucky guy!
Well, I may have exaggerated a bit earlier,\nbut Uesugi-kun is going to a university in Tokyo,\nright? In that case, I'm a little worried.
Why?
It'll be a long-distance relationship. I don't mean\nto interfere, but it might be good to take the relationship to the next level before that happens.
Yeah, that's right.\nIt's definitely better to deepen your relationship\nbefore that!
Deepen, our relationship?!
Uesugi-kun probably is dwelling over the thought of\nhaving to leave behind someone as cute as you.
To be fair, guys can't control themselves.
Huh...
